description: LOGOS structured communication protocol. Schema validation for arguments. Every claim must be falsifiable, time-bounded, and strongly-typed. No rhetoric survives.

validation_rules: Must be falsifiable — if no measurement could disprove it, reject
statement_types.rosetta_analog: Entity definition in ontology/ — must have id, links, valid namespace
statement_types.schema_link: Same rigor as JSON Schema 2020-12 validation. Missing required field = invalid.

attack_types.description: Claimed cause doesn't produce claimed effect

attack_types.note: Measurement — you didn't measure something important
Geometry — you left the valid shape
Reaction — follow the energy, find the bias

attack_types.description: Evidence is unreliable, fabricated, or insufficient

statement_types.rosetta_analog: Blocked merge — specific reason why a family-shape combination fails the gate

statement_types.description: Modifies an existing claim with mandatory confidence adjustment
statement_types.rosetta_analog: Merge — taking a claim through a gate, adjusting it to pass physics constraints
Unexplored merge status — 'I don't know, but here's what would tell me'
statement_types.trust_effect: Costly honesty bonus when reality validates the uncertainty

statement_types.description: Concludes a debate with measured outcome
statement_types.rosetta_analog: Final merge gate verdict — CLEAN, SUSPECT, or CORRUPTED

llm_translation_pipeline.description: Six-step extraction converting natural language to LOGOS. Strips rhetoric, forces structure.

steps.rosetta_analog: Validate against schema — remove what doesn't fit
Compute seed entropy — how certain is the structure?
Check referential integrity — find dangling references
Physics guard — reject what can't be tested

unfalsifiability_rejection.description: Any statement that cannot be measured or disproved is rejected outright. No vague assertions survive LOGOS.
examples_rejected: This will improve things long-term (no timeframe, no metric)
Innovation drives growth (unfalsifiable without operational definition)
We believe in our people (no measurable claim)
unfalsifiability_rejection.rosetta_link: Same as physics_grounded_protection — reject claims that violate conservation laws. If you can't measure it, it's not physics.
